Advocate Partner Network

HNI WORLD OS > Legalnomics > Advocate Partner Network

India First Pincode Ready Law Firm SaaS

Advocate and Law Firm Partner Layer

This layer is designed to onboard individual advocates, junior lawyers, law firms, notary professionals and legal service providers into the Legalnomics network. It supports lead discovery, specialization routing, geo-based visibility and SaaS account onboarding.
